inverterSourcesNotConfigured: Not configured (set DEYE_* and/or HUAWEI_* on server)
huaweiNorthboundRateLimited: Plant list temporarily unavailable (FusionSolar rate limit). Retry in a few minutes; avoid other tools using the same Northbound user.
huaweiAuthFailedHint: FusionSolar login failed (check HUAWEI_USER_NAME and HUAWEI_SYSTEM_CODE on the server).
dischargeGoAria: Run SoC discharge toward the selected floor (selling first, then zero export to CT). May take many minutes.
dischargeSocDeltaAria: Target SoC (%) after discharge. Saved for peak DAM auto-discharge and as the manual discharge default.
dischargeSoc2Hint: Selling-first until SoC reaches the selected floor, then zero export to CT (rewrites Deye TOU template). May take many minutes.
dischargeSoc2Partial: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Target SoC was not reached within the server time limit; zero export to CT restored.
dischargeSoc2PartialFlat: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Cloud SoC did not show a change before the time limit; zero export to CT was restored. The inverter may still be discharging—reported SoC often lags.
dischargeConfirmNoSoc: Aktuální SoC není k dispozici. Počkejte na načtení.
dischargeConfirmInsufficientSoc: Nelze dosáhnout {{target}}% SoC: aktuální úroveň ({{current}}%) je už na nebo pod touto hladinou.
chargeGoAria: Run grid-biased charge toward higher SoC (may take many minutes).
chargeSocDeltaAria: Target SoC increase: 2, 10, 20, 50, or 100 percentage points (capped at 100%). Saved for this inverter.
chargeSoc2Hint: Raises battery SoC via dynamicControl (same TOU overwrite as discharge). May take many minutes.
chargeSoc2Partial: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Target SoC was not reached within the server time limit; zero export to CT restored.
chargeSoc2PartialFlat: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Cloud SoC did not show a change before the time limit; zero export to CT was restored. Charging may still be in progress—reported SoC often lags.
deyeCommandWaiting: Waiting for Deye. This may take several minutes…
deyeCommandContinuesBackground: The inverter continues until the target SoC is reached, then restores zero export to CT.
deyeWritePinTitlePeak: Enter PIN to change peak DAM discharge
deyeWritePinTitleLow: Enter PIN to change low DAM charge
deyeWritePinTitlePeakPct: Enter PIN to save discharge depth
deyeWritePinTitleLowPct: Enter PIN to save charge depth
deyeWritePinTitleSelfConsumption: Enter PIN to change self consumption
deyeWritePinTitleSelfConsumptionAutoDam: Enter PIN to change DAM vs LCOE auto self-consumption
deyeWritePinTitleNightCharge: Enter PIN to change night charge (23:00–07:00)
deyeRemoteWriteNeedsPin: Remote control is off for this inverter. Add a PIN suffix in the Deye Cloud plant or inverter name (e.g. "My site pin1234"), then reload the list.
chargeConfirmNoSoc: Current battery SoC is not available. Wait for the value to load, then try again.
chargeConfirmNoHeadroom: Not enough room to add that much SoC (already near 100%).
lowDamChargeToggleAria: Server runs charge at the Kyiv clock hour of today’s lowest DAM price; depth is the dropdown value (+10% … +100%). One successful run per day per inverter per low hour; retries after failure.
lowDamChargeToggleHint: Stored on the server (Flyway V9). Low-DAM auto uses the same SoC rise % as the dropdown.
lowDamChargeSaveError: Could not save low-DAM charge preference
nightChargeToggleAria: When enabled, the server charges the battery during the Kyiv night window (23:00–06:59), turns on self consumption, and turns off peak DAM discharge and low DAM charge. Depth uses the charge SoC dropdown value. One successful run per night per inverter.
nightChargeToggleHint: Stored on the server (Flyway V23). Uses Europe/Kyiv local time.
nightChargeSaveError: Could not save night charge preference
peakDamDischargeToggleAria: Server runs SoC discharge at the Kyiv clock hour of today’s DAM peak; target floor is the dropdown till-SoC (5–80%). One successful run per day per inverter per peak hour; retries after failure.
peakDamDischargeToggleHint: Stored on the server (Flyway V6/V7). Peak auto uses the same SoC drop % as the dropdown. Reverse-proxy timeout should exceed the manual discharge duration.
peakDamDischargeSaveError: Could not save peak DAM preference
qrAsideAria: B12 — uncrewed systems unit, b12.army (opens in new tab)
openSourceGithubAria: Zdrojový kód Open EMS na GitHubu (nový panel)
sharePageAria: Sdílet odkaz na tuto stránku (port, jazyk, měnič)
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionLabel: Export Peak DAM — kWh do sítě (všechny relace)
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionHint: Součet kWh ze všech zaznamenaných relací auto-vybíjení v špičce (od startu do zero-export) za celou dobu u tohoto měniče.
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionSubtitleMi: Zastaveno před cílem (časový limit nebo ploché SoC v cloudu)
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeLabel: Ruční vybití — kWh do sítě (všechny relace)
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeHint: Součet kWh ze všech zaznamenaných relací ručního vybití z UI/API (do zero-export) za celou dobu u tohoto měniče.
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeSubtitleM: Zastaveno před cílem (časový limit nebo ploché SoC v cloudu)
powerFlowLandingExportTotalHint: Celkový export do sítě (kWh) z vzorků v databázi pro tento měnič.
powerFlowLandingExportTotalHintFleet: Souhrnný export do sítě (kWh) ze vzorků pro všechny měniče.
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionHintFleet: Součet exportu ze všech relací peak DAM (všechny měniče, celá doba).
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeHintFleet: Součet exportu ze všech ručních relací UI/API (všechny měniče, celá doba).
powerFlowLandingArbitrageHint: UAH z DB vzorků: každých 5 min import kWh × hodinová DAM cena minus export kWh × stejná cena (den a hodina dle Kyjeva). Sečteno přes vzorky s odpovídajícím řádkem DAM.
powerFlowLandingArbitrageHintFleet: Flotila: stejný výpočet pro všechny měniče.
powerFlowLandingTariffLineLead: Tarif v {{month}} ~ {{rate}} UAH/kWh vč. distribuce a DPH (
powerFlowLandingTariffPartial: Tarif v {{month}} ~ {{rate}} UAH/kWh vč. distribuce a DPH
powerFlowLandingTariffUnavailable: Srovnání tarifu DAM není k dispozici (chybí OREE nebo data v DB).
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleTotal: Hodinový export do sítě — posledních {{days}} kyjevských dnů (pouze hodiny s exportem)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitlePeak: Hodinový špičkový export (auto) — posledních {{days}} kyjevských dnů (jen okna peak-DAM sezení)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleManual: Hodinový export při ručním vybití — posledních {{days}} kyjevských dnů (jen okna sezení)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleArbitrage: Hodinový výnos z exportu při DAM — posledních {{days}} kyjevských dnů (jen hodiny s exportem)
powerFlowPeakHourlyChartEmpty: V tomto období nebyl žádný export do sítě.
powerFlowPeakHourlyChartOpenAria: Otevřít graf hodinového exportu do sítě
solarInsolationNoCoords: Set plant location in Deye Cloud for forecast
gridDamTariffNodeTitle: OREE DAM UAH/kWh for the current Kyiv clock hour today when hourly data exists; otherwise the current-month average (MTD) from landing totals.
gridHiddenByInverter: Aggregate grid is hidden while an inverter is selected
hubBrandLinkAria: 220 km — oficiální web (otevře se v novém panelu)
evHiddenByInverter: Aggregate EV charging is hidden while an inverter is selected
lcoeBatteryMetaTitle: Illustrative LiFePO4 LCOE (UAH/kWh): reference $/kWh × BOS ÷ (usable DOD × equivalent cycles) at NBU USD→UAH. Tune POWER_FLOW_REF_LIFEPO4_USD_PER_KWH, POWER_FLOW_BATTERY_BOP_MULT, POWER_FLOW_BATTERY_USABLE_DOD, POWER_FLOW_BATTERY_EQUIV_CYCLES. Not a site quote.
lcoeSolarMetaTitle: Illustrative tier-1 PV LCOE (UAH/kWh): installed $/W at NBU USD→UAH ÷ (yield kWh/kWp·year × years). Tune POWER_FLOW_REF_PV_USD_PER_W, POWER_FLOW_PV_LIFE_YEARS, POWER_FLOW_PV_YIELD_KWH_PER_KW_YEAR. Not a site quote.
damEntsoeNotConfigured: ENTSOE_SECURITY_TOKEN is not set — run sync on a server with the token, or prices stay empty.
damLegendAriaToggleUaEntsoe: Show or hide UA (ENTSO-E Transparency) EUR/kWh line
damGridBarsCaption: Grid energy: Import - up, Export - down
damHuaweiDbSamplesHint: No Huawei power samples in the database for this Kyiv calendar day yet. The server saves them periodically when HUAWEI_* is configured, or you can refresh now.
damPvLoadBarsCaption: Gen/Cons energy: Generation - up, Consumption - down
damEnergyTotalsGridAria: Grid import and export totals for the selected calendar day
damEnergyTotalsPvLoadAria: Generation, consumption, and lost solar totals for the selected calendar day
damOreeNotConfigured: OREE_API_KEY is not set — DAM line will be empty until prices are synced on a server with the key.
damSyncNote: DAM prices were just synced from OREE for this view.
damLazyOreeExhausted: On-demand OREE sync for tomorrow reached the server limit. DAM uses the database only until the next scheduled sync or POST /api/dam/sync.
damOreeWebsiteAria: Otevře web OREE v nové kartě
damOreeEmbedIframeTitle: OREE — oficiální denní trh (DAM) na oree.com.ua
addDeyeMessengerTitle: Kontaktujte nás přes Telegram nebo WhatsApp
addDeyeMessengerPrefill:
Dobrý den, rád/a bych přidal(a) měnič Deye do Open EMS.

#addDeyeInverter
damIndexesVsYesterdayAria: Average DAM index change vs previous trade day: {{pct}}%
roiSamplesHint: Need at least two PV samples in the database for this inverter (5-minute snapshots).
roiLoadSamplesHint: Need at least two load (consumption) samples in the database for this inverter (5-minute snapshots) to value energy at DAM when you consume.
roiMissingDamHint: Some energy slices had no DAM price ({{n}} slice(s)); value may be understated.
roiCollectingHint: ROI appears after at least 6 hours from the start date.
roiStackAria: Zdroje ROI: spotřeba kWh · DAM (Kyjev) · PV reference · ostatní — zástupné.
roiSetupPinForbidden: PIN rejected or remote control not allowed for this inverter.
addDeyeInstructionTitle: Jak udělit přístup v Deye Cloud
addDeyeInstructionStep1Alt: Otevřete menu a klepněte na Správa přístupu
addDeyeInstructionStep3Alt: Klepněte na Přidat v sekci Oprávnění uživatelé
addDeyeInstructionStep5Alt: Použijte vyhledávání pro rychlé nalezení účtu
selfConsumptionToggleAria: Zapnuto — baterie se volně vybíjí pro pokrytí zátěže (ZERO_EXPORT_TO_CT, TOU SoC = 5%). Špičkový výboj v hodině špičky využívá zbývající SoC.
selfConsumptionToggleHint: Baterie nejprve pokrývá zátěž; špičkový prodej ze zbytku. Uloženo na serveru (Flyway V21).
selfConsumptionSaveError: Nepodařilo se uložit předvolbu vlastní spotřeby
selfConsumptionAutoDamToggleAria: When enabled, the server turns self-consumption on when the current Kyiv hour DAM price (UAH/kWh) is above the reference battery LCOE (NBU × POWER_FLOW_*), and off when it is not. Night charge disables this rule. Manual self-consumption is locked while auto is on.
selfConsumptionAutoDamToggleHint: Same LCOE formula as GET /api/power-flow/reference-lcoe. Scheduler: DEYE_SELF_CONSUMPTION_AUTO_DAM_* env.
selfConsumptionAutoDamSaveError: Could not save DAM vs LCOE auto preference
seoMetaDescription: Open EMS — open-source EMS for solar, battery storage, and EV charging in Ukraine. Integrates OREE DAM (day-ahead / РДН), intraday (ВДР), and power arbitrage on the integrated power system (IPS / ОЕС). Real-time power flow, Deye and Huawei support.
seoMetaKeywords: Open EMS, EMS Ukraine, DAM, IDM, RDN, VDR, electricity arbitrage, OREE, IPS, integrated power system, day-ahead market, intraday market, Deye inverter, Huawei FusionSolar, smart charging, DER, 220-km
rdnCallbackMessengerHint: Send your request via a messenger — we will call you back.
